rule.statement: Every component file is ≤ 80 lines of JSX + minimal local state. Past that, extract.

rationale.source: Internal context-fit measurements; Kent C. Dodds — small components

rule.rationale: 80-line budget keeps each file in an agent's working context window; humans also benefit.

rule.statement: Stateful logic lives in `useX` hooks; component file imports the hook, never inlines it.
rule.rationale: Hooks isolate logic for testing and reuse; inlined logic is invisible to other components.

rule.statement: Group by feature (`features/billing/`) not by type (`components/`, `hooks/`). Cross-feature shared items go to `shared/`.
rule.rationale: Feature folders scale with codebase; type folders fragment with size.

rule.statement: I/O (fetch, db, telemetry) lives in `services/` modules; hooks call services; components call hooks.
rule.rationale: Three-layer separation lets you mock I/O in tests and swap implementations.

rule.statement: Each extract is followed by a test run; next move blocked until green.
rule.rationale: Same as Fowler — green tests bisect failing moves immediately.
